examples: So my stepdaughter is now my stepmother.
The woman was on trial for abusing her stepdaughter.
I love sewing; making PROM dresses years ago with my stepdaughter is a fond memory.
Mr Brown has been campaigning for the past two years for answers over his stepdaughter's death.
Hawthorne's stepdaughter, Fallon Stubbs, who was 14 years old when her mother was killed, also testified.
